name: Product Hunt
description: Product Hunt API v2 (GraphQL) - browse posts, products, topics, collections, users, and votes

tools.name: query
tools.description: Execute a custom GraphQL query against the Product Hunt API v2. Use this for any query not covered by the other tools. See https://api.producthunt.com/v2/docs for the full schema.

tools.name: get_posts
tools.description: Get recent or trending Product Hunt posts. Returns name, tagline, URL, votes count, comments count, and more. Use 'order' to sort by RANKING, VOTES, NEWEST, or FEATURED_AT.

query.default: query GetPosts($first: Int, $after: String, $order: PostsOrder, $postedAfter: DateTime, $postedBefore: DateTime, $topic: String) { posts(first: $first, after: $after, order: $order, postedAfter: $postedAfter, postedBefore: $postedBefore, topic: $topic) { edges { node { id name tagline slug url votesCount commentsCount createdAt featuredAt website thumbnail { url } topics { edges { node { name slug } } } makers { id name username } } cursor } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } totalCount } }

order.description: Sort order: RANKING, VOTES, NEWEST, or FEATURED_AT

postedAfter.description: ISO 8601 date — only posts after this date (e.g., 2026-03-04T00:00:00Z)

postedBefore.description: ISO 8601 date — only posts before this date

tools.name: get_post
tools.description: Get a specific Product Hunt post by its slug. Returns full details including description, media, makers, votes, and comments.

query.default: query GetPost($slug: String!) { post(slug: $slug) { id name tagline slug url description votesCount commentsCount createdAt featuredAt website reviewsRating reviewsCount thumbnail { url } media { type url videoUrl } topics { edges { node { id name slug } } } makers { id name headline username profileImage } productLinks { type url } } }

tools.name: get_topic
tools.description: Get a Product Hunt topic by slug, including its top posts. Use this to browse categories like 'artificial-intelligence', 'developer-tools', 'design-tools', etc.

query.default: query GetTopic($slug: String!) { topic(slug: $slug) { id name slug description followersCount postsCount } }

tools.name: get_topics
tools.description: List available Product Hunt topics/categories. Use this to discover topic slugs for filtering posts.

query.default: query GetTopics($first: Int, $after: String) { topics(first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id name slug description followersCount postsCount } cursor } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: Get a Product Hunt collection by slug with its curated posts.

query.default: query GetCollection($slug: String!) { collection(slug: $slug) { id name slug description followersCount postsCount coverImage posts(first: 20) { edges { node { id name tagline slug url votesCount } } } user { id name username } } }

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get a Product Hunt user profile by username, including their headline, submitted products, and follower counts.

query.default: query GetUser($username: String!) { user(username: $username) { id name username headline profileImage coverImage followersCount followingCount madePosts(first: 10) { edges { node { id name tagline slug url votesCount } } totalCount } submittedPosts(first: 10) { edges { node { id name tagline slug url votesCount } } totalCount } } }

tools.name: get_viewer
tools.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile on Product Hunt.

query.default: query GetViewer { viewer { user { id name username headline profileImage followersCount followingCount } } }

tools.name: get_post_comments
tools.description: Get comments on a specific Product Hunt post by slug.

query.default: query GetPostComments($slug: String!, $first: Int, $after: String) { post(slug: $slug) { id name comments(first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id body createdAt user { id name username profileImage } replies(first: 5) { edges { node { id body createdAt user { id name username } } } } } cursor } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } totalCount } } }

tools.name: get_post_votes
tools.description: Get voters on a specific Product Hunt post by slug.

query.default: query GetPostVotes($slug: String!, $first: Int, $after: String) { post(slug: $slug) { id name votesCount votes(first: $first, after: $after) { edges { node { id createdAt user { id name username headline } } cursor } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } totalCount } } }
